title: palicourea luteonivea
intro: Palicourea luteonivea, also known as the yellow-green palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Palicourea luteonivea include reducing fever, treating digestive issues, and alleviating pain, making it a valued plant in traditional medicine. Palicourea luteonivea can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
